title: salix × ganderi
intro: Salix × ganderi, also known as Gander's willow, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Salix genus, which includes various types of willow trees. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × ganderi include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, headaches, and menstrual cramps. Salix × ganderi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
